body: DialogR is a desktop application for statistical analysis built on top of R. It combines guided, dialog-driven procedures with a live R console, a script editor, a workspace pane, and a data editor, making it possible to move seamlessly between point-and-click analysis and direct scripting in R.
It is designed as an incipient alternative to traditional statistical packages such as SPSS, while keeping users close to the actual R syntax and objects that power the analysis.
highlights: Connects directly to the R runtime and keeps the analytical workflow close to real R syntax.
Provides dialogs for common statistical procedures and data preparation tasks.
Encourages transparent, reproducible workflows by building R commands with every click.
